title: aizoon dregeanum
intro: Aizoon dregeanum, also known as Drege's carpetweed, is a succulent plant species that belongs to the family Aizoaceae. It is traditionally used in South African folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating wounds, and relieving respiratory issues. Aizoon dregeanum is often prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and its leaves and stems are used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
